positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic forest: towering bioluminescent trees with glowing emerald leaves and twisting, ethereal roots. The scene features a central, stylized celestial body (like a crescent moon or stylized planet) partially visible through swirling nebula clouds of deep indigo and royal purple. Floating among the trees are stylized, geometric shapes representing distant constellations and tiny, glowing orbs of gold light. The overall composition should have a strong, centralized silhouette against a dramatic, high-contrast night sky. Style: Flat vector art mixed with cosmic watercolor textures. Color Palette: Deep indigo, emerald green, royal purple, contrasted with luminous gold and cyan accents. Perfect for screen printing on a black or navy garment. Wallpaper-worthy, high detail, high contrast, symmetrical elements.
negative: blur, noise, realistic photo, poor composition, messy, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, grainy, low contrast
